name: Keep Nearby
description: Keeps important assistant replies and notes close to the current chat without turning them into global memory.

permissions.reason: Reads the current chat and selected text so saved items stay tied to the right place.
Shows the current chat name and source chat for saved items.
Creates or switches chats only when you choose that result action.
Reads the assistant message you keep and opens its source later.
Sends a drawer result to the current chat only when you choose that action.
Answers your Keep Nearby prompt using only the current chat, pins, and notes.
Saves pins, notes, and reviewed state for the current chat.
Refreshes the drawer when the active chat or messages change.
Adds Keep Nearby to the chat tools.
Adds a Keep Nearby shortcut near the top of the app.
Adds Keep nearby to assistant messages.
Shows Keep Nearby in a drawer.
Adds an optional Keep Nearby command.
Copies drawer results when you choose Copy.
Confirms saved, reviewed, restored, and removed items.

commands.name: keep-nearby
commands.label: Open Keep Nearby
commands.description: Open the Keep Nearby drawer for this chat.

modelAssignments.label: Keep Nearby Assistant
modelAssignments.description: A focused model slot for working with pins and notes from the current chat.
